headline: 62-year-old sports retail giant cuts 100s of jobs
summary: Sportswear is still a growth market, but not every brand is winning equally. North American retail sales of sports-related apparel and footwear were projected to reach $173 billion in 2025 and rise to $209 billion by 2029, according to a McKinsey & Company report. But the report also ...
